summary: The diff shows modifications to the three target landing pages (BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx, SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage.tsx, ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx) and supporting files, but the file contents are truncated and do not reveal the actual JSX/CSS changes to the top section. The project_state.json marks REQ-1 as 'pending', suggesting the centering implementation may not have been applied. There is no visible evidence of centering styles being added to the hero/top sections of any of the three pages.

missing_requirements.requirement: On the SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, and ZurichCouplesLandingPage, ensure the topmost section (hero/header section) is horizontally centered in desktop view, consistent with the centering applied to lower sections on these pages.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for all three page files is truncated and does not show any centering styles applied to the top section. The project_state.json explicitly marks the related feature request (AR-2) as 'pending', indicating the centering was not implemented. No CSS or Tailwind class evidence of desktop-only centering is visible in the diff.
